mapper.sql: id, document_id, user_id, action, ip_address, user_agent, created_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_document_access_log WHERE document_id = #{documentId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM sys_document_access_log WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM sys_document_access_log WHERE document_id = #{documentId} AND action = #{action} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM sys_document_access_log WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND action = #{action} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_document_access_log (id, document_id, user_id, action, ip_address, user_agent, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{documentId}, #{userId}, #{action}, #{ipAddress}, #{userAgent}, #{createdAt})
